one_line_value_proposition: Multidisciplinary digital weight management programme with NICE HTG700 recommendation — combining behavioural, nutritional and activity support for NHS tier 2/3 pathways.
why_it_matters_locally: Obesity prevalence continues to rise, and NHS weight management services face significant capacity constraints. W8Buddy offers a digital multidisciplinary approach that can scale tier 2/3 provision while maintaining clinical quality.
target_problem_statement: Limited NHS tier 2/3 weight management capacity, rising obesity prevalence, and increasing demand driven by GLP-1 agonist prescribing pathways requiring structured behavioural support.
evidence_summary: NICE HTG700 recommendation. Evidence supporting digital multidisciplinary weight management including behavioural change and nutritional support.
patients_covered_note: Early-stage NHS deployment. Evidence generation in progress.
dtac_note: Confirm current DTAC status with W8Buddy.
cyber_notes: Confirm data hosting, DPA terms and security certifications with W8Buddy.
gdpr_note: Confirm data hosting and DPA terms with W8Buddy.
target_patients: Adults with overweight or obesity referred to tier 2 or tier 3 weight management services.
exclusions: Confirm clinical exclusion criteria with W8Buddy and local pathway leads.
onboarding_detail: Clinician referral into structured programme. Patient accesses app with multidisciplinary support.
supplier_wrap: W8Buddy provides programme management, clinical support team and outcome reporting.
local_wraparound_detail: Referral pathway and patient identification process required. Integration with local tier 3 or medication pathway may be needed.
training_note: Referrer training and pathway agreement required.
monitoring_model: Non-continuous multidisciplinary review. Not a continuously monitored service.
monitoring_note: Non-continuous review. Multidisciplinary team supports patients within programme. Not a continuously monitored service.
escalation_note: Escalation to tier 3 or clinical services as clinically indicated.
operating_hours_caveat: Not a monitored emergency service. Ensure patients have appropriate escalation routes.
implementation_prerequisites: Patient identification and eligibility criteria agreed
indicative_price_text: Pricing is negotiated locally. Indicative cost per patient pathway is in the range of £250–£400 depending on volume commitments and service configuration. Commissioners should request a detailed pricing proposal.
service_wrap_description: Full multidisciplinary service wrap included: dietitian, psychologist, and physical activity specialist support, digital programme content, patient support, and commissioner reporting. No additional service costs beyond the per-patient fee.
service_wrap_note: Multidisciplinary support included in programme model.
contract_note: Contact W8Buddy for NHS procurement options.
procurement_notes: Not currently available on a national framework. Local procurement required — typically via direct award for pilot commissions or competitive quotation for larger deployments. Supplier can provide standard NHS terms and conditions.
expected_benefit_note: Multidisciplinary approach may improve completion rates and outcomes compared with single-discipline models. Potential to reduce downstream demand on Tier 3 services and obesity-related secondary care.
tariff_considerations: No direct tariff displacement. May reduce GP consultation frequency and specialist referrals for weight-related conditions over the medium term. Compare with face-to-face tier 2/3 service costs when modelling.
provider_income_note: No direct provider income implications. Referral to W8Buddy does not generate or displace a tariff payment for primary care.
roi_note: Supplier ROI modelling suggests potential system savings of £1,500–£2,500 per patient over 5 years from reduced obesity-related healthcare utilisation. These estimates are modelled assumptions — validate locally.
minimum_conditions_for_success: Referral pathway with primary care or weight management service. Minimum 100 patient cohort for meaningful outcome data.
source_summary: NICE HTG700, NICE CG189, W8Buddy website.
confidence_note: Content based on publicly available information. Verify current assurance and pricing with W8Buddy before procurement.
